charter: Derive and ship M27 from .planning/VISION.md and current product gaps after M26. Focus on the next bounded redaction/retention-defaults step: reviewer-owned policy recommendations or review aids derived from existing pii_categories, without automatically mutating retention_days, log_level, mask_in_traces, sensitivity_class, policy verify, or serve behavior. PM must reconcile M26 as shipped at c1cd53a, define exact scope and constraints, then route dev/QA/product-marketing through AgentXchain for real code, tests, docs, QA evidence, and launch artifacts.
acceptance_contract: Implementation changes are local/offline and deterministic
No runtime enforcement or compliance overclaim
Tests cover new M27 behavior and npm test passes
AgentXchain gates pass or internal gates are approved by delegated operator

history.reason: planning artifacts for this intent already exist on disk; intent superseded during approval
